items.title: High-performance Visual Semantics Compression for AI-Driven Science.
items.abstract: Scientific images play a crucial role in many experimental sciences; however, the large volumes of data generated present significant challenges. Effective image compression must be fast, achieve high compression ratios, and preserve critical domain-specific features. Existing compressors, such as JPEG and SZ, often distort important textures when operating at high compression ratios. Conversely, AI-based compressors offer superior image quality and higher compression ratios but are significantly slower than traditional methods. To address this trade-off, we developed ViSemZ, a high-performance AI-based compressor specifically designed to preserve visual semantics. Our approach enhances AI compression by integrating sparse encoding with variable-length integer truncation, optimized lossless encoding using bitshuffle and a decoupled lookback prefix-sum, and pipelining techniques to enable efficient data streaming and asynchronous processing. Evaluations on scientific datasets demonstrate that, at comparable compression ratios, ViSemZ achieves performance almost on par with existing AI-based compressors while delivering a 9.6× overall compression speedup. These results effectively bridge the performance gap between traditional and AI-based compression methods.
items.abstract_zh: 科学图像在许多实验科学中发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，生成的大量数据带来了重大挑战。有效的图像压缩必须速度快，实现高压缩比，并保留关键的特定领域特征。现有的压缩器（例如 JPEG 和 SZ）在以高压缩比运行时经常会扭曲重要的纹理。相反，基于人工智能的压缩器可提供卓越的图像质量和更高的压缩比，但速度明显慢于传统方法。为了解决这种权衡问题，我们开发了 ViSemZ，这是一种基于人工智能的高性能压缩器，专门用于保留视觉语义。我们的方法通过将稀疏编码与可变长度整数截断集成、使用 bitshuffle 和解耦回溯前缀和的优化无损编码以及管道技术来增强 AI 压缩，以实现高效的数据流和异步处理。对科学数据集的评估表明，在相当的压缩比下，ViSemZ 的性能几乎与现有基于 AI 的压缩器相当，同时提供 9.6 倍的整体压缩加速。这些结果有效地弥补了传统压缩方法和基于人工智能的压缩方法之间的性能差距。

items.title: WaterWise: Co-optimizing Carbon- and Water-Footprint Toward Environmentally Sustainable Cloud Computing.
items.abstract: The carbon and water footprint of large-scale computing systems poses serious environmental sustainability risks. In this study, we discover that, unfortunately, carbon and water sustainability are at odds with each other - and, optimizing one alone hurts the other. Toward that goal, we introduce, WaterWise, a novel job scheduler for parallel workloads that intelligently co-optimizes carbon and water footprint to improve the sustainability of geographically distributed data centers.
items.abstract_zh: 大型计算系统的碳足迹和水足迹构成了严重的环境可持续性风险。在这项研究中，我们不幸地发现，碳和水的可持续性是相互矛盾的——单独优化其中一个会损害另一个。为了实现这一目标，我们推出了 WaterWise，这是一种用于并行工作负载的新型作业调度程序，可以智能地共同优化碳足迹和水足迹，以提高地理分布数据中心的可持续性。

items.title: Fairer and More Scalable Reader-Writer Locks by Optimizing Queue Management.
items.abstract: MCS lock and its variants provide scalability on many-core architectures, using lists of lock requests to reduce access contention on the mutex data. Most recent variants have adopted a two-stage design, allowing requests to be allocated from stack memory rather than heap. However, this design still produces mutex access contention and limits fairness in the presence of fast paths. This paper proposes the Freezer mechanism and its optimization methods, which extend the list structure operations of MCS lock, to reduce mutex access without using heap memory and enable an independent choice of fairness policies and fast paths. Additionally, we propose four optimization methods for queue-based reader-writer locks. Our evaluation using three benchmarks demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed fair reader-writer locks. They achieved up to 3.5× higher throughput and improved tail latency by up to 2.7× compared to the baselines.
items.abstract_zh: MCS 锁及其变体在多核架构上提供可扩展性，使用锁请求列表来减少互斥数据的访问争用。最近的变体采用了两阶段设计，允许从堆栈内存而不是堆中分配请求。然而，这种设计仍然会产生互斥访问争用，并在存在快速路径的情况下限制公平性。本文提出了Freezer机制及其优化方法，扩展了MCS锁的列表结构操作，在不使用堆内存的情况下减少互斥访问，并实现公平策略和快速路径的独立选择。此外，我们提出了四种基于队列的读写锁的优化方法。我们使用三个基准的评估证明了所提出的公平读写锁的有效性。与基线相比，他们的吞吐量提高了 3.5 倍，尾部延迟提高了 2.7 倍。

items.title: SGDRC: Software-Defined Dynamic Resource Control for Concurrent DNN Inference on NVIDIA GPUs.
items.abstract: Cloud service providers heavily colocate high-priority, latency sensitive (LS), and low-priority, best-effort (BE) DNN inference services on the same GPU to improve resource utilization in data centers. Among the critical shared GPU resources, there has been very limited analysis on the dynamic allocation of compute units and VRAM bandwidth, mainly for two reasons: (1) The native GPU resource management solutions are either hardware-specific, or unable to dynamically allocate resources to different tenants, or both; (2) NVIDIA doesn't expose interfaces for VRAM bandwidth allocation, and the software stack and VRAM channel architectures are black-box, both of which limit the software-level resource management. These drive prior work to design either conservative sharing policies detrimental to throughput, or static resource partitioning only applicable to a few GPU models.
items.abstract_zh: 云服务提供商在同一 GPU 上大量部署高优先级、延迟敏感 (LS) 和低优先级、尽力而为 (BE) DNN 推理服务，以提高数据中心的资源利用率。在关键的共享GPU资源中，对计算单元和VRAM带宽的动态分配的分析非常有限，主要有两个原因：（1）原生GPU资源管理解决方案要么是特定于硬件的，要么无法动态地将资源分配给不同的租户，或者两者兼而有之； (2) NVIDIA没有公开VRAM带宽分配的接口，软件堆栈和VRAM通道架构都是黑盒的，这都限制了软件级资源管理。这些推动了之前的工作，要么设计不利于吞吐量的保守共享策略，要么设计仅适用于少数 GPU 型号的静态资源分区。

items.title: Frontier-guided Graph Reordering.
items.abstract: Graph reordering is an effective technique for improving the access locality of graph processing. However, existing methods often overlook the data access locality among concurrently activated vertices (a.k.a. frontiers). These vertices, while lacking direct connections or shared neighbors, can exhibit significant locality attributed to their overlapped k-order in-neighbors. However, calculating such overlaps directly is computationally prohibitive. We propose to estimate the overlapped k-order in-neighbors through frontier distribution analysis based on a few BFS samples. Our proposed graph reordering method, FrontOrder, constructs feature vectors from the frontier distribution of BFS samples, and employs K-means clustering with a custom distance metric to group vertices with high locality. Additionally, the learned clusters can predict runtime computing intensity, enabling load balancing through vertex reordering. FrontOrder achieves average speedups of 2.65× on Ligra and 1.73× on GPOP, outperforming state-of-the-art methods.
items.abstract_zh: 图重排序是提高图处理访问局部性的有效技术。然而，现有的方法经常忽略同时激活的顶点（也称为边界）之间的数据访问局部性。这些顶点虽然缺乏直接连接或共享邻居，但由于其重叠的 k 阶邻居而表现出显着的局部性。然而，直接计​​算这种重叠在计算上是令人望而却步的。我们建议通过基于一些 BFS 样本的前沿分布分析来估计重叠的 k 阶近邻。我们提出的图重新排序方法 FrontOrder 从 BFS 样本的前沿分布构造特征向量，并采用具有自定义距离度量的 K 均值聚类来对具有高局部性的顶点进行分组。此外，学习到的集群可以预测运行时计算强度，从而通过顶​​点重新排序实现负载平衡。 FrontOrder 在 Ligra 上实现了 2.65 倍的平均加速，在 GPOP 上实现了 1.73 倍的平均加速，优于最先进的方法。

items.title: Big Atomics and Fast Hash Tables.
items.abstract: In this work, we present theoretically and practically efficient implementations of Big Atomics, i.e., k-word linearizable registers that support the load, store, and compare-and-swap (CAS) operations. While modern hardware supports k = 1 and sometimes k = 2 (e.g., double-width compare-and-swap in x86), our implementations support arbitrary k. Big Atomics are useful in many applications, including atomic manipulation of tuples, version lists, and implementing load-linked/store-conditional (LL/SC). We design fast, lock-free implementations of big atomics based on a novel fast-path-slow-path approach we develop. We then use them to develop an efficient concurrent hash table, as evidence of their utility.
items.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了大原子在理论上和实践上的高效实现，即支持加载、存储和比较和交换（CAS）操作的 k 字线性化寄存器。虽然现代硬件支持 k = 1，有时 k = 2（例如，x86 中的双宽比较和交换），但我们的实现支持任意 k。大原子在许多应用程序中都很有用，包括元组的原子操作、版本列表以及实现加载链接/条件存储 (LL/SC)。我们基于我们开发的新颖的快路径-慢路径方法设计了大原子的快速、无锁实现。然后我们使用它们来开发一个高效的并发哈希表，作为它们实用性的证据。

items.title: Popcorn: Accelerating Kernel K-means on GPUs through Sparse Linear Algebra.
items.abstract: K-means is a popular clustering algorithm with significant applications in numerous scientific and engineering areas. One drawback of K-means is its inability to identify non-linearly separable clusters, which may lead to inaccurate solutions in certain cases. Kernel K-means is a variant of classical K-means that can find non-linearly separable clusters. However, it scales quadratically with respect to the size of the dataset, taking several minutes to cluster even medium-sized datasets on traditional CPU-based machines.
items.abstract_zh: K-means 是一种流行的聚类算法，在众多科学和工程领域具有重要应用。 K-means 的一个缺点是它无法识别非线性可分离的簇，这在某些情况下可能会导致解不准确。核 K 均值是经典 K 均值的变体，可以找到非线性可分离的簇。然而，它会根据数据集的大小进行二次缩放，在传统的基于 CPU 的机器上甚至需要几分钟才能对中等大小的数据集进行聚类。

items.title: Minimizing speculation overhead in a parallel recognizer for regular texts.
items.abstract: Speculative data-parallel algorithms for language recognition have been widely experimented for various types of finitestate automata (FA), deterministic (DFA) and nondeterministic (NFA), often derived fromregular expressions (RE). Such an algorithm cuts the input string into chunks, independently recognizes each chunk in parallel by means of identical FAs, and at last joins the chunk results and checks the overall consistency. In chunk recognition, it is necessary to speculatively start the FAs in any state, thus causing an overhead that reduces the speedup over a serial algorithm. The existing data-parallel DFA-based recognizers suffer from an excessive number of starting states, and the NFA-based ones suffer from the number of nondeterministic transitions.
items.abstract_zh: 用于语言识别的推测性数据并行算法已针对各种类型的有限状态自动机 (FA)、确定性 (DFA) 和非确定性 (NFA) 进行了广泛的实验，这些算法通常源自正则表达式 (RE)。该算法将输入字符串切分成块，通过相同的FA并行地独立识别每个块，最后连接块结果并检查整体一致性。在块识别中，需要在任何状态下推测性地启动 FA，从而导致开销降低串行算法的加速比。现有的基于 DFA 的数据并行识别器受到起始状态数量过多的影响，而基于 NFA 的识别器则受到不确定性转换数量的影响。

items.title: GLumin: Fast Connectivity Check Based on LUTs For Efficient Graph Pattern Mining.
items.abstract: Graph Pattern Mining (GPM) has made significant progress in recent years, supporting a range of big data applications. However, GPM applications are memory-intensive as they require a tremendous amount of edge checking, which involves enumerating all possible vertex pairs and checking their connectivity or counting the common neighbors of each pair. Adjacent list or CSR format is widely used in recent GPM systems to overcome the sparsity of real-world graph, at the cost of sacrificing the ability to query the connectivity of two vertices in O(1) compared with the raw adjacent matrix. In this paper, we rethink the format to store graph in GPM systems, by partial "restoring" graph from CSR to adjacent matrix, we can significantly accelerate checking connectivity or counting common neighbors for GPM algorithms. However, directly storing graph in adjacent matrix is cost-prohibitive, thus we propose GLumin, by selectively constructing a lookup table (LUT) at the runtime, which holds the connectivity that can be repeatedly retrieved at low cost. The LUTs are compressed and tailored to fit the hierarchical memory architecture like shared memory of GPU or cache of CPU. We adopt GLumin technique to several SOTA GPM systems like AutoMine, G2Miner and GraphFold, bringing two orders of magnitude speedup to them on more than 100 different graphs and 24 patterns, demonstrating the general applicability and significance of our methods.
items.abstract_zh: 图模式挖掘（GPM）近年来取得了重大进展，支持了一系列大数据应用。然而，GPM 应用程序是内存密集型的，因为它们需要大量的边缘检查，这涉及枚举所有可能的顶点对并检查它们的连接性或计算每对的公共邻居。相邻列表或 CSR 格式在最近的 GPM 系统中被广泛使用，以克服现实世界图的稀疏性，但代价是牺牲与原始相邻矩阵相比在 O(1) 中查询两个顶点的连通性的能力。在本文中，我们重新思考了 GPM 系统中存储图的格式，通过将图从 CSR 部分“恢复”到相邻矩阵，我们可以显着加快 GPM 算法的连通性检查或公共邻居计数。然而，直接将图存储在相邻矩阵中的成本过高，因此我们提出 GLumin，通过在运行时选择性地构建查找表（LUT）来保存可以以低成本重复检索的连接性。 LUT 经过压缩和定制，以适应分层内存架构，例如 GPU 的共享内存或 CPU 的缓存。我们将 GLumin 技术应用于 AutoMine、G2Miner 和 GraphFold 等多个 SOTA GPM 系统，在 100 多个不同的图和 24 种模式上为它们带来两个数量级的加速，证明了我们的方法的普遍适用性和意义。

items.title: SBMGT: Scaling Bayesian Multinomial Group Testing.
items.abstract: Group testing is a widely used binary classification method that efficiently distinguishes between samples with and without a binary-classifiable attribute by pooling and testing subsets of a group. Bayesian Group Testing (BGT) is the state-of-the-art approach, which integrates prior risk information into a Bayesian Boolean Lattice framework to minimize test counts and reduce false classifications. However, BGT, like other existing group testing techniques, struggles with multinomial group testing, where samples have multiple binary-classifiable attributes that can be individually distinguished simultaneously. We address this need by proposing Bayesian Multinomial Group Testing (BMGT), which includes a new Bayesian-based model and supporting theorems for an efficient and precise multinomial pooling strategy. We further design and develop SBMGT, a high-performance and scalable framework to tackle BMGT's computational challenges by proposing three key innovations: 1) a parallel binary-encoded product lattice model with up to 99.8% efficiency; 2) the Bayesian Balanced Partitioning Algorithm (BBPA), a multinomial pooling strategy optimized for parallel computation with up to 97.7% scaling efficiency on 4096 cores; and 3) a scalable multinomial group testing analytics framework, demonstrated in a real-world disease surveillance case study using AIDS and STDs datasets from Uganda, where SBMGT reduced tests by up to 54% and lowered false classification rates by 92% compared to BGT.
items.abstract_zh: 组测试是一种广泛使用的二元分类方法，它通过汇集和测试组的子集来有效地区分具有和不具有二元可分类属性的样本。贝叶斯组测试 (BGT) 是最先进的方法，它将先前的风险信息集成到贝叶斯布尔格框架中，以最大限度地减少测试计数并减少错误分类。然而，BGT 与其他现有的组测试技术一样，在多项组测试中遇到了困难，其中样本具有多个可以同时单独区分的二元可分类属性。我们通过提出贝叶斯多项式组测试（BMGT）来满足这一需求，其中包括一个新的基于贝叶斯的模型和支持高效且精确的多项池策略的定理。我们进一步设计和开发了 SBMGT，这是一个高性能、可扩展的框架，通过提出三个关键创新来解决 BMGT 的计算挑战：1）效率高达 99.8% 的并行二进制编码乘积点阵模型； 2) 贝叶斯平衡分区算法 (BBPA)，这是一种针对并行计算进行优化的多项池策略，在 4096 个核心上的扩展效率高达 97.7%； 3) 可扩展的多项组测试分析框架，在使用乌干达艾滋病和性传播疾病数据集的真实疾病监测案例研究中得到证明，与 BGT 相比，SBMGT 减少了高达 54% 的测试，并将错误分类率降低了 92%。

items.title: Accelerating GNNs on GPU Sparse Tensor Cores through N: M Sparsity-Oriented Graph Reordering.
Triangle Counting on Tensor Cores.
items.abstract: Triangle counting is a fundamental graph algorithm used to identify the number of triangles within a graph. This algorithm can be reformulated into linear algebraic operations, including sparse matrix multiplication, intersection and reduction. Modern GPUs, equipped with Tensor Cores, offer massive parallelism that can significantly accelerate graph algorithms. However, leveraging Tensor Cores, originally designed for dense matrix multiplication, to handle sparse workloads for triangle counting presents non-trivial challenges. In this paper, we introduce ToT, which enhances the utilization of Tensor Cores and expands their functionalities for diverse sparse matrix operations. In experiments, ToT is evaluated against state-of-the-art methods. ToT outperform the second-fastest method with an 11.56× speedup in end-to-end execution. This work represents a pioneering exploration into utilizing Tensor Cores for accelerating graph algorithms.
items.abstract_zh: 三角形计数是一种基本的图形算法，用于识别图形中三角形的数量。该算法可以重新表述为线性代数运算，包括稀疏矩阵乘法、交集和约简。配备 Tensor Core 的现代 GPU 提供大规模并行性，可以显着加速图形算法。然而，利用最初为密集矩阵乘法设计的 Tensor Core 来处理三角形计数的稀疏工作负载会带来不小的挑战。在本文中，我们引入了 ToT，它增强了 Tensor Core 的利用率并扩展了其用于各种稀疏矩阵运算的功能。在实验中，根据最先进的方法对 ToT 进行评估。 ToT 的端到端执行速度提高了 11.56 倍，优于第二快的方法。这项工作代表了利用 Tensor Core 加速图算法的开创性探索。

items.title: Magneto: Accelerating Parallel Structures in DNNs via Co-Optimization of Operators.
items.abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) increasingly rely on parallel structures to enhance performance and efficiency. However, existing machine learning compilers (MLCs) face challenges in optimizing these structures due to limited parallel fusion scopes and insufficient consideration of intra-operator information. This paper introduces Magneto, a novel framework designed to accelerate parallel structures in DNNs through the co-optimization of parallel operators. By expanding the scope of parallel operator fusion and introducing a dedicated co-tuning algorithm, Magneto unlocks new opportunities for co-optimization. Experimental results demonstrate that Magneto outperforms NVIDIA TensorRT and AMD MIGraphX, achieving speedups of 3.02× and 4.19×, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 越来越依赖并行结构来提高性能和效率。然而，由于并行融合范围有限且对算子内信息考虑不足，现有的机器学习编译器（MLC）在优化这些结构方面面临挑战。本文介绍了 Magneto，这是一种新颖的框架，旨在通过并行算子的协同优化来加速 DNN 中的并行结构。通过扩大并行算子融合的范围并引入专用的协同调整算法，Magneto 开启了协同优化的新机会。实验结果表明，Magneto 的性能优于 NVIDIA TensorRT 和 AMD MIGraphX，分别实现了 3.02 倍和 4.19 倍的加速。

items.title: Reciprocating Locks.
items.abstract: We present Reciprocating Locks, a novel mutual exclusion locking algorithm, targeting cache-coherent shared memory (CC), that enjoys a number of desirable properties. The doorway arrival phase and the Release operation both run in constant-time. Waiting threads use local spinning and only a single waiting element is required per thread, regardless of the number of locks a thread might hold at a given time. While our lock does not provide strict FIFO admission, it bounds bypass and has strong anti-starvation properties. The lock is compact, space efficient, and has been intentionally designed to be readily usable in real-world general purpose computing environments such as pthreads, or C++. We show the lock exhibits high throughput under contention and low latency in the uncontended case. Under sustained contention, Reciprocating Locks generate less coherence traffic than MCS and CLH. The performance of Reciprocating Locks is competitive with and often better than the best state-of-the-art scalable queue-based spin locks.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了往复锁，一种新颖的互斥锁定算法，针对缓存一致性共享内存 (CC)，具有许多理想的属性。门口到达阶段和释放操作都以恒定时间运行。等待线程使用本地自旋，并且每个线程只需要一个等待元素，无论线程在给定时间可能持有的锁数量如何。虽然我们的锁不提供严格的 FIFO 准入，但它会限制旁路并具有很强的抗饥饿特性。该锁结构紧凑、节省空间，并且经过精心设计，可轻松用于现实世界的通用计算环境，例如 pthreads 或 C++。我们证明锁在争用情况下表现出高吞吐量，在无争用情况下表现出低延迟。在持续竞争的情况下，往复锁产生的一致性流量比 MCS 和 CLH 少。往复锁的性能可与最先进的可扩展的基于队列的自旋锁相媲美，而且通常更好。

items.title: An AI-Enhanced 1km-Resolution Seamless Global Weather and Climate Model to Achieve Year-Scale Simulation Speed using 34 Million Cores.
items.abstract: Global Storm Resolving Models (GSRMs) is crucial for understanding extreme weather events under the climate change background. In this study, we optimize Global-Regional Integrated Forecast System (GRIST), which is a unified weather-climate modeling system designed for research and operation, for the next-generation Sunway supercomputer, incorporating AI-enhanced physics suite, OpenMP-based parallelization, and mixed-precision optimizations to enhance both efficiency and performance portability, as well as the unified modeling capability. Our experiments successfully capture significant events during the "23.7" extreme rainfall over northern China influenced by super Typhoon Doksuri, at 1km resolution. Notably, our work scales to 34 million cores, enabling simulation speeds at 491 SDPD (3km) and 181 SDPD (1km).
items.abstract_zh: 全球风暴解决模型（GSRM）对于理解气候变化背景下的极端天气事件至关重要。在本研究中，我们针对下一代神威超级计算机优化了全球区域综合预报系统（GRIST），这是一个专为研究和运行而设计的统一天气气候建模系统，结合了人工智能增强物理套件、基于OpenMP的并行化和混合精度优化，以提高效率和性能可移植性以及统一建模能力。我们的实验成功捕捉到了受超强台风“多克苏里”影响的中国北方“23.7”极端降雨期间的重大事件，分辨率为1公里。值得注意的是，我们的工作扩展到 3400 万个核心，实现了 491 SDPD（3 公里）和 181 SDPD（1 公里）的模拟速度。

items.title: MARLIN: Mixed-Precision Auto-Regressive Parallel Inference on Large Language Models.
items.abstract: As inference on Large Language Models (LLMs) emerges as an important workload in machine learning applications, model weight quantization has become a standard technique for efficient GPU deployment. Quantization not only reduces model size, but has also been shown to yield substantial speedups for single-user inference, due to reduced memory movement, with low accuracy impact. Yet, it remains a key open question whether speedups are achievable also in batched settings with multiple parallel clients, which are highly relevant for practical serving. It is unclear whether GPU kernels can be designed to remain practically memory-bound, while supporting the substantially increased compute requirements of batched workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 随着大型语言模型 (LLM) 推理成为机器学习应用中的重要工作负载，模型权重量化已成为高效 GPU 部署的标准技术。量化不仅可以减小模型大小，而且由于减少了内存移动，因此可以显着提高单用户推理的速度，并且对精度的影响较小。然而，在具有多个并行客户端的批处理设置中是否也可以实现加速仍然是一个关键的悬而未决的问题，这与实际服务高度相关。目前尚不清楚 GPU 内核是否可以设计为实际上保持内存限制，同时支持批量工作负载大幅增加的计算需求。

items.title: Balanced Allocations over Efficient Queues: A Fast Relaxed FIFO Queue.
items.abstract: Relaxed semantics have been introduced to increase the achievable parallelism of concurrent data structures in exchange for weakening their ordering semantics. In this paper, we revisit the balanced allocations d-choice load balancing scheme in the context of relaxed FIFO queues. Our novel load balancing approach distributes operations evenly across n sub-queues based on operation counts, achieving low relaxation errors independent on the queues size, as opposed to similar earlier designs. We prove its relaxation errors to be of O(n log log n/log d) with high probability for a collection of possible executions. Furthermore, our scheme, contrary to previous ones, manages to interface and integrate the most performant linearizable queue designs from the literature as components. Our resulting relaxed FIFO queue is experimentally shown to outperform the previously best design using balanced allocations by more than four times in throughput, while simultaneously incurring less than a thousandth of its relaxation errors. In a concurrent breadth-first-search benchmark, our queue consistently outperforms both relaxed and strict state-of-the-art FIFO queues.
items.abstract_zh: 引入了宽松的语义来增加并发数据结构可实现的并行性，以换取削弱其排序语义。在本文中，我们在宽松 FIFO 队列的背景下重新审视平衡分配 d-choice 负载平衡方案。与类似的早期设计相反，我们新颖的负载平衡方法根据操作计数将操作均匀地分布在 n 个子队列中，从而实现独立于队列大小的低松弛误差。我们证明，对于可能执行的集合，其松弛误差为 O(n log log n/log d)，概率很高。此外，与以前的方案相反，我们的方案设法将文献中最高性能的线性化队列设计作为组件进行接口和集成。实验表明，我们得到的松弛 FIFO 队列的吞吐量比之前使用平衡分配的最佳设计高出四倍以上，同时产生的松弛误差不到千分之一。在并发广度优先搜索基准中，我们的队列始终优于宽松和严格的最先进 FIFO 队列。

items.title: LibRTS: A Spatial Indexing Library by Ray Tracing.
items.abstract: The Ray-Tracing (RT) core has become a widely integrated feature in modern GPUs to accelerate ray-tracing rendering. Recent research has shown that RT cores can also be repurposed to accelerate non-rendering workloads. Since the RT core essentially serves as a hardware accelerator for Bounding Volume Hierarchy (BVH) tree traversal, it holds the potential to significantly improve the performance of spatial workloads. However, the specialized RT programming model poses challenges for using RT cores in these scenarios. Inspired by the core functionality of RT cores, we designed and implemented LibRTS, a spatial index library that leverages RT cores to accelerate spatial queries. LibRTS supports both point and range queries and remains mutable to accommodate changing data. Instead of relying on a case-by-case approach, LibRTS provides a general, highperformance spatial indexing framework for spatial data processing. By formulating spatial queries as RT-suitable problems and overcoming load-balancing challenges, LibRTS delivers superior query performance through RT cores without requiring developers to master complex programming on this specialized hardware. Compared to CPU and GPU spatial libraries, LibRTS achieves speedups of up to 85.1x for point queries, 94.0x for range-contains queries, and 11.0x for range-intersects queries. In a real-world application, pointin-polygon testing, LibRTS also surpasses the state-of-the-art RT method by up to 3.8x.
items.abstract_zh: 光线追踪 (RT) 核心已成为现代 GPU 中广泛集成的功能，可加速光线追踪渲染。最近的研究表明，RT 核心也可以重新调整用途，以加速非渲染工作负载。由于 RT 核心本质上充当边界体积层次 (BVH) 树遍历的硬件加速器，因此它具有显着提高空间工作负载性能的潜力。然而，专门的 RT 编程模型给在这些场景中使用 RT 内核带来了挑战。受到 RT 核心核心功能的启发，我们设计并实现了 LibRTS，这是一个利用 RT 核心加速空间查询的空间索引库。 LibRTS 支持点查询和范围查询，并保持可变以适应不断变化的数据。 LibRTS 没有依赖具体情况的方法，而是为空间数据处理提供了通用的高性能空间索引框架。通过将空间查询制定为适合 RT 的问题并克服负载平衡挑战，LibRTS 通过 RT 内核提供卓越的查询性能，而无需开发人员掌握此专用硬件上的复杂编程。与 CPU 和 GPU 空间库相比，LibRTS 的点查询加速高达 85.1 倍，范围包含查询加速 94.0 倍，范围相交查询加速 11.0 倍。在实际应用中，点多边形测试中，LibRTS 的性能也比最先进的 RT 方法高出 3.8 倍。

items.title: FlashFFTStencil: Bridging Fast Fourier Transforms to Memory-Efficient Stencil Computations on Tensor Core Units.
items.abstract: While Tensor Core Units (TCUs) excel in AI tasks, their application to HPC algorithms like stencil computations faces significant challenges due to sparsity, which leads to underutilization and exacerbates memory-bound limitations. This paper introduces FlashFFTStencil1, a memory-efficient stencil computing system designed to bridge FFT to fully-dense stencil computations on TCUs. Aimed at bound shifting, FlashFFTStencil comprises three key techniques: Kernel Tailoring on HBM fuses distinct kernels to enhance parallelism while reducing memory transfer and footprint; Architecture Aligning on SMEM restructures FFT-based stencil computations into dense matrix multiplications tailored for shared memory architecture; Computation Streamlining on TCU optimizes TCU utilization and thread parallelism by minimizing pipeline stalls and maximizing register reuse. Notably, a distinctive extension is FlashFFTStencil's ability to enable theoretically unrestricted temporal fusion by FFT. Results show that FlashFFTStencil achieves effective sparsity-free bound shifting, with an average speedup of 2.57x over the state-of-the-art. FlashFFTStencil pioneers a new era in unifying computational patterns within the HPC landscape and bridges them with cutting-edge AI-driven hardware innovations like TCUs.
items.abstract_zh: 虽然张量核心单元 (TCU) 在 AI 任务中表现出色，但它们在模板计算等 HPC 算法中的应用因稀疏性而面临重大挑战，这会导致利用率不足并加剧内存限制。本文介绍了 FlashFFTStencil1，这是一种内存高效的模板计算系统，旨在将 FFT 与 TCU 上的全密集模板计算连接起来。针对边界移位，FlashFFTStencil 包含三项关键技术： HBM 上的内核定制融合了不同的内核以增强并行性，同时减少内存传输和占用空间； SMEM 上的架构对齐将基于 FFT 的模板计算重构为专为共享内存架构定制的密集矩阵乘法； TCU 上的计算简化通过最小化管道停顿和最大化寄存器重用来优化 TCU 利用率和线程并行性。值得注意的是，FlashFFTStencil 的一个独特扩展是能够通过 FFT 实现理论上不受限制的时间融合。结果表明，FlashFFTStencil 实现了有效的无稀疏边界移位，平均加速比最先进的技术高 2.57 倍。 FlashFFTStencil 开创了统一 HPC 领域计算模式的新时代，并将它们与 TCU 等尖端人工智能驱动的硬件创新联系起来。

items.title: Setting a Course for Post-Moore Software Performance.
items.abstract: Software performance engineering is the science and art of making code run fast or otherwise limiting its consumption of resources, such as energy, memory footprint, network utilization, response time, etc. Performance engineering encompasses parallel computing, but it also includes other techniques, such as caching, vectorization, algorithms, bit tricks, loop unrolling, compiler-switch selection, tailoring code to the architecture, exploiting sparsity, changing data representation, metaprogramming, etc. I will explain why the end of Moore's Law makes software performance engineering a critical technical skill for the future. I will also argue that the PPoPP community is ideally positioned to show leadership in SPE and that it would be wise to change the meaning of its acronym to "Principles and Practice of Performance Programming."
items.abstract_zh: 软件性能工程是使代码快速运行或以其他方式限制其资源消耗（例如能源、内存占用、网络利用率、响应时间等）的科学和艺术。性能工程包含并行计算，但它也包括其他技术，例如缓存、向量化、算法、位技巧、循环展开、编译器开关选择、根据架构定制代码、利用稀疏性、改变数据表示、元编程等。我将解释为什么摩尔定律的终结使软件性能工程成为一项关键的技术技能为了未来。我还认为，PPoPP 社区处于展示 SPE 领导地位的理想位置，并且将其缩写词的含义更改为“性能编程的原理和实践”是明智的。

items.title: Boost Lock-free Queue and Stack with Batching.
items.abstract: Concurrent queues and stacks are important components of many software systems. They are well-known contended data structures due to intense contention on hotspots, resulting in limited performance and poor scalability. To achieve higher performance, several attempts applied the batching technique, which packs a group of standard operations into a single batch for execution, to lock-free queues and stacks built upon the linked list, but still inherited the contended compare-and-swap (CAS).
items.abstract_zh: 并发队列和堆栈是许多软件系统的重要组成部分。由于热点竞争激烈，它们是众所周知的竞争数据结构，导致性能有限和可扩展性差。为了获得更高的性能，一些尝试应用了批处理技术，将一组标准操作打包到一个批处理中执行，以建立在链表上的无锁队列和堆栈，但仍然继承了竞争的比较和交换（CAS）。

items.title: ATTNChecker: Highly-Optimized Fault Tolerant Attention for Large Language Model Training.
items.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable performance in various natural language processing tasks. However, the training of these models is computationally intensive and susceptible to faults, particularly in the attention mechanism, which is a critical component of transformer-based LLMs. In this paper, we investigate the impact of faults on LLM training, focusing on INF, NaN, and near-INF values in the computation results with systematic fault injection experiments. We observe the propagation patterns of these errors, which can trigger non-trainable states in the model and disrupt training, forcing the procedure to load from checkpoints. To mitigate the impact of these faults, we propose ATTNChecker, the first Algorithm-Based Fault Tolerance (ABFT) technique tailored for the attention mechanism in LLMs. ATTNChecker is designed based on fault propagation patterns of LLM and incorporates performance optimization to adapt to both system reliability and model vulnerability while providing lightweight protection for fast LLM training. Evaluations on four LLMs show that ATTNChecker incurs on average 7% overhead on training while detecting and correcting all extreme errors. Compared with the state-of-the-art checkpoint/restore approach, ATTNChecker reduces recovery overhead by up to 49×.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）在各种自然语言处理任务中表现出了卓越的性能。然而，这些模型的训练计算量大且容易出现故障，特别是在注意力机制方面，这是基于 Transformer 的 LLM 的关键组成部分。在本文中，我们通过系统的故障注入实验研究了故障对 LLM 训练的影响，重点关注计算结果中的 INF、NaN 和近 INF 值。我们观察这些错误的传播模式，这可能会触发模型中的不可训练状态并扰乱训练，迫使程序从检查点加载。为了减轻这些故障的影响，我们提出了 ATTNChecker，这是第一个为法学硕士注意力机制量身定制的基于算法的容错（ABFT）技术。 ATTNChecker基于LLM的故障传播模式进行设计，并结合性能优化，以适应系统可靠性和模型漏洞，同时为快速LLM训练提供轻量级保护。对四位法学硕士的评估表明，ATTNChecker 在检测和纠正所有极端错误时平均会产生 7% 的训练开销。与最先进的检查点/恢复方法相比，ATTNChecker 可将恢复开销减少高达 49 倍。

items.title: WeiPipe: Weight Pipeline Parallelism for Communication-Effective Long-Context Large Model Training.
items.abstract: Training large language models (LLMs) has become increasingly expensive due to the rapid expansion in model size. Pipeline parallelism is a widely used distributed training technique. However, as LLMs with larger context become prevalent and memory optimization techniques advance, traditional PP methods encounter greater communication challenges due to the increased size of activations and gradients of activations. To address this issue, we introduce weight-pipeline parallelism (WeiPipe) that transitions from an activation-passing pipeline to a weight-passing pipeline. WeiPipe reduces communication costs and achieves a more balanced utilization by transmitting only weights and their gradients between workers in a pipeline manner. WeiPipe does not rely on collective communication primitives, thus ensuring scalability. We present four variations of WeiPipe parallelism, including WeiPipe-Interleave, which emphasizes communication efficiency, and WeiPipe-zero-bubble, discussing the potential for minimal bubble ratios. Our implementation of WeiPipe-Interleave, performed on up to 32 GPUs and tested in various model configurations, including large-context LLM training, demonstrates a significant improvement in throughput compared to state-of-the-art pipeline parallelism and fully sharded data parallelism with different underlying infrastructures, including NVLink connections within cluster with Ethernet among cluster, and PCIe within cluster and Ethernet among cluster. Additionally, WeiPipe also shows greater scalability in communication-constrained scenarios compared to state-of-art strategies.
items.abstract_zh: 由于模型大小的快速膨胀，训练大型语言模型（LLM）变得越来越昂贵。管道并行是一种广泛使用的分布式训练技术。然而，随着具有更大上下文的法学硕士的流行以及内存优化技术的进步，传统的并程方法由于激活大小和激活梯度的增加而遇到了更大的通信挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了权重管道并行性（WeiPipe），它从激活传递管道过渡到权重传递管道。 WeiPipe通过以管道方式在worker之间仅传输权重及其梯度，降低了通信成本并实现了更平衡的利用率。 WeiPipe 不依赖集体通信原语，从而确保了可扩展性。我们提出了 WeiPipe 并行性的四种变体，包括强调通信效率的 WeiPipe-Interleave 和讨论最小气泡比率潜力的 WeiPipe-zero-bubble。我们的 WeiPipe-Interleave 实现在多达 32 个 GPU 上执行，并在各种模型配置（包括大上下文 LLM 训练）中进行了测试，与最先进的管道并行性和具有不同底层基础设施的完全分片数据并行性相比，吞吐量显着提高，包括集群内与集群间以太网的 NVLink 连接，以及集群内 PCIe 和集群间以太网。此外，与最先进的策略相比，WeiPipe 在通信受限的场景中还表现出更大的可扩展性。

items.title: Mario: Near Zero-cost Activation Checkpointing in Pipeline Parallelism.
items.abstract: Large language models have to be trained in parallel due to their large number of parameters and significant memory footprint. Among various parallelism techniques, pipeline parallelism is widely adopted in inter-node scenarios with minimal communication overhead. However, state-of-the-art pipeline schemes lead to extra and imbalanced memory footprints, leaving room for further improvement. In this paper, we propose Mario, a pipeline optimizer that automatically tessellates activation checkpointing to existing pipeline schemes, enabling training larger models (or longer sequences) with less and balanced memory footprint across GPUs and improved GPU utilization. First, the activation recomputation can be effectively overlapped in the bubbles by moving it earlier in the execution process, thereby improving overall efficiency. With eliminated memory footprint through checkpointing, Mario allows for preposing more forward computation into the pipeline bubbles, making more room for further overlapping with greater flexibility, and thus exploiting the bubbles. Then we design a lightweight pipeline simulator to model execution behavior w/o|w/ Mario. Finally, we introduce an automatic pipeline scheduler specifically for Mario, capable of searching for near optimal combination of checkpointing and pipeline configurations within minutes. Experimental results on GPT3 and LLaMA2 models show that Mario can speed up existing state-of-the-art pipeline schemes (w/o|w/ checkpointing) including 1F1B, Chimera, and Interleave by 1.16×|1.57× on average. This work paves a new direction for effective low-cost pipeline training.
items.abstract_zh: 由于大型语言模型具有大量参数和大量内存占用，因此必须并行训练。在各种并行技术中，管道并行被广泛应用于节点间场景，且通信开销最小。然而，最先进的管道方案会导致额外且不平衡的内存占用，从而为进一步改进留下了空间。在本文中，我们提出了 Mario，这是一种管道优化器，可以自动将激活检查点细分到现有的管道方案，从而能够在 GPU 之间使用更少且平衡的内存占用来训练更大的模型（或更长的序列），并提高 GPU 利用率。首先，通过将激活重新计算移到执行过程的早期，可以在气泡中有效地重叠，从而提高整体效率。通过检查点消除了内存占用，马里奥允许在管道气泡中预先进行更多的前向计算，为进一步重叠和更大的灵活性留出更多空间，从而利用气泡。然后我们设计了一个轻量级的管道模拟器来模拟 Mario 的执行行为。最后，我们专门为 Mario 引入了一个自动管道调度程序，能够在几分钟内搜索检查点和管道配置的近乎最佳组合。 GPT3 和 LLaMA2 模型的实验结果表明，Mario 可以将包括 1F1B、Chimera 和 Interleave 在内的现有最先进的管道方案（w/o|w/ 检查点）平均加速 1.16×|1.57×。这项工作为有效的低成本管道培训开辟了新方向。

items.title: DORADD: Deterministic Parallel Execution in the Era of Microsecond-Scale Computing.
items.abstract: Deterministic parallelism is a key building block for distributed and fault-tolerant systems that offers substantial performance benefits while guaranteeing determinism. By studying existing deterministically parallel systems (DPS), we identify certain design pitfalls, such as batched execution and inefficient runtime synchronization, that preclude them from meeting the demands of μs-scale and high-throughput distributed systems deployed in modern datacenters.
items.abstract_zh: 确定性并行性是分布式和容错系统的关键构建块，它在保证确定性的同时提供了显着的性能优势。通过研究现有的确定性并行系统（DPS），我们发现了某些设计缺陷，例如批量执行和低效的运行时同步，这些缺陷使它们无法满足现代数据中心部署的微秒级和高吞吐量分布式系统的需求。

items.title: Adaptive Parallel Training for Graph Neural Networks.
items.abstract: There are several strategies to parallelize graph neural network (GNN) training over multiple GPUs. We observe that there is no consistent winner (i.e., with the shortest running time), and the optimal strategy depends on the graph dataset, GNN model, training algorithm, and hardware configurations. As such, we design the APT system to automatically select efficient parallelization strategies for GNN training tasks. To this end, we analyze the trade-offs of the strategies and design simple yet effective cost models to compare their execution time and facilitate strategy selection. Moreover, we also propose a general abstraction of the strategies, which allows to implement a unified execution engine that can be configured to run different strategies. Our experiments show that APT usually chooses the optimal or a close to optimal strategy, and the training time can be reduced by over 2x compared with always using a single strategy. APT is open-source at https://github.com/kaihaoma/APT.
items.abstract_zh: 有多种策略可以在多个 GPU 上并行化图神经网络 (GNN) 训练。我们观察到，没有一致的获胜者（即运行时间最短），并且最优策略取决于图数据集、GNN 模型、训练算法和硬件配置。因此，我们设计 APT 系统来自动为 GNN 训练任务选择有效的并行化策略。为此，我们分析了策略的权衡，并设计了简单而有效的成本模型来比较它们的执行时间并促进策略选择。此外，我们还提出了策略的通用抽象，它允许实现一个可以配置为运行不同策略的统一执行引擎。我们的实验表明，APT 通常会选择最优或接近最优的策略，与始终使用单一策略相比，训练时间可以减少 2 倍以上。 APT 是开源的，网址为 https://github.com/kaihaoma/APT。

items.title: RT-BarnesHut: Accelerating Barnes-Hut Using Ray-Tracing Hardware.
items.abstract: The n-body problem involves calculating the effect of bodies on each other. n-body simulations are ubiquitous in the fields of physics and astronomy and notoriously computationally expensive. The naïve algorithm for n-body simulations has the prohibiting O(n2) time complexity. Reducing the time complexity to O(n · lg(n)), the tree-based Barnes-Hut algorithm approximates the effect of bodies beyond a certain threshold distance. Other than algorithmic improvements, extensive research has gone into accelerating n-body simulations on GPUs and multi-core systems. However, Barnes-Hut is a tree-traversal algorithm, which makes it a poor target for acceleration using traditional GPU shader cores. In contrast, recent work shows that, for tree-based computations, GPU ray-tracing (RT) cores dominate shader cores. In this work, we reformulate the Barnes-Hut algorithm as a ray-tracing problem and implement it with NVIDIA OptiX. Our evaluation shows that the resulting system, RT-BarnesHut, outperforms current state-of-the-art GPU-based implementations.
items.abstract_zh: n 体问题涉及计算物体之间的影响。多体模拟在物理学和天文学领域中无处不在，而且众所周知，计算成本高昂。用于 n 体模拟的朴素算法具有惊人的 O(n2) 时间复杂度。基于树的 Barnes-Hut 算法将时间复杂度降低到 O(n · lg(n))，近似于超出特定阈值距离的物体的效果。除了算法改进之外，还进行了大量研究以加速 GPU 和多核系统上的 n 体模拟。然而，Barnes-Hut 是一种树遍历算法，这使得它成为使用传统 GPU 着色器核心进行加速的不良目标。相比之下，最近的研究表明，对于基于树的计算，GPU 光线追踪 (RT) 核心在着色器核心中占主导地位。在这项工作中，我们将 Barnes-Hut 算法重新表述为光线追踪问题，并使用 NVIDIA OptiX 实现它。我们的评估表明，最终的系统 RT-BarnesHut 的性能优于当前最先进的基于 GPU 的实现。

items.title: AC-Cache: A Memory-Efficient Caching System for Small Objects via Exploiting Access Correlations.
items.abstract: In-memory key-value (KV) caching bridges the performance gap between high-performance networks and disk devices. However, prior in-memory KV caching systems either consider large objects or introduce additional memory overhead. In this paper, we conduct a systematic analysis over 56 production traces, and make three observations: (i) small objects dominate the traces and data accesses are highly skewed; (ii) the hotness of objects keeps stable across days; and (iii) the multi-get operation that retrieves multiple objects from the same node incurs much shorter tail latency than purely using the single-get operation.
items.abstract_zh: 内存中键值 (KV) 缓存弥补了高性能网络和磁盘设备之间的性能差距。然而，现有的内存KV缓存系统要么考虑大对象，要么引入额外的内存开销。在本文中，我们对 56 个生产痕迹进行了系统分析，并得出三个观察结果：（i）小物体在痕迹中占主导地位，数据访问高度倾斜； (ii) 物体的热度在几天内保持稳定； (iii)从同一节点检索多个对象的多获取操作比纯粹使用单获取操作产生更短的尾延迟。

items.title: BerryBees: Breadth First Search by Bit-Tensor-Cores.
items.abstract: Breadth First Search (BFS) plays a key role in computational science, networking, and artificial intelligence applications. Although the BFS approach has been extensively studied, particularly in its direction-optimized form, existing implementations still present three main issues: (1) high memory footprint; (2) the under-realized lightweight representations using bitmaps; and (3) the underuse of modern hardware such as Tensor Cores Units (TCUs).
items.abstract_zh: 广度优先搜索（BFS）在计算科学、网络和人工智能应用中发挥着关键作用。尽管 BFS 方法已被广泛研究，特别是其方向优化形式，但现有实现仍然存在三个主要问题：（1）内存占用高； (2) 使用位图实现的轻量级表示； (3) 张量核心单元 (TCU) 等现代硬件未得到充分利用。

items.title: TensorMD: Molecular Dynamics Simulation with Ab Initio Accuracy of 50 Billion Atoms.
items.abstract: Molecular dynamics simulation emerges as an important area that HPC+AI helps to investigate the physical properties, with machine-learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) being used. General-purpose machine-learning (ML) tools have been leveraged in MLIPs, but they are not perfectly matched with each other, since many optimization opportunities in MLIPs have been missed by ML tools. This inefficiency arises from the fact that HPC+AI applications work with far more computational complexity compared with pure AI scenarios. This paper has developed an MLIP, named TensorMD, independently from any ML tool. TensorMD has been evaluated on two supercomputers and scaled to 51.8 billion atoms, i.e., ~ 3× compared with state-of-the-art.
items.abstract_zh: 分子动力学模拟成为 HPC+AI 通过使用机器学习原子间势 (MLIP) 来帮助研究物理性质的一个重要领域。通用机器学习 (ML) 工具已在 MLIP 中得到利用，但它们彼此之间并不完美匹配，因为 MLIP 中的许多优化机会都被 ML 工具错过了。这种低效率的原因在于，与纯 AI 场景相比，HPC+AI 应用程序的计算复杂性要高得多。本文开发了一个独立于任何机器学习工具的 MLIP，名为 TensorMD。 TensorMD 已在两台超级计算机上进行了评估，并扩展到 518 亿个原子，即与最先进技术相比约 3 倍。

items.title: Aggregating Funnels for Faster Fetch&Add and Queues.
items.abstract: Many concurrent algorithms require processes to perform fetch-and-add operations on a single memory location, which can be a hot spot of contention. We present a novel algorithm called Aggregating Funnels that reduces this contention by spreading the fetch-and-add operations across multiple memory locations. It aggregates fetch-and-add operations into batches so that the batch can be performed by a single hardware fetch-and-add instruction on one location and all operations in the batch can efficiently compute their results by performing a fetch-and-add instruction on a different location. We show experimentally that this approach achieves higher throughput than previous combining techniques, such as Combining Funnels, and is substantially more scalable than applying hardware fetch-and-add instructions on a single memory location. We show that replacing the fetch-and-add instructions in the fastest state-of-the-art concurrent queue by our Aggregating Funnels eliminates a bottleneck and greatly improves the queue's overall throughput.
items.abstract_zh: 许多并发算法要求进程在单个内存位置上执行获取和添加操作，这可能是争用的热点。我们提出了一种称为聚合漏斗的新颖算法，该算法通过将获取和添加操作分散到多个内存位置来减少这种争用。它将获取和添加操作聚合为批次，以便该批次可以通过一个位置上的单个硬件获取和添加指令来执行，并且该批次中的所有操作都可以通过在不同位置上执行获取和添加指令来有效地计算其结果。我们通过实验证明，这种方法比以前的组合技术（例如组合漏斗）实现了更高的吞吐量，并且比在单个内存位置上应用硬件获取和添加指令的可扩展性要高得多。我们证明，用我们的聚合漏斗替换最快的最先进并发队列中的获取和添加指令可以消除瓶颈，并极大地提高队列的整体吞吐量。

items.title: Transactional Data Structures with Orthogonal Metadata.
items.abstract: Transactional Data Structure Programming Systems (TD-SPSs) let programmers compose method invocations on concurrent data structures into coarse-grained, isolated transactions. They detect conflicts among concurrent transactions and recover when operations do not commute.
items.abstract_zh: 事务数据结构编程系统 (TD-SPS) 允许程序员将对并发数据结构的方法调用组合成粗粒度、隔离的事务。它们检测并发事务之间的冲突，并在操作不通勤时进行恢复。

items.title: FlashSparse: Minimizing Computation Redundancy for Fast Sparse Matrix Multiplications on Tensor Cores.
items.abstract: Sparse Matrix-matrix Multiplication (SpMM) and Sampled Dense-dense Matrix Multiplication (SDDMM) are important sparse operators in scientific computing and deep learning. Tensor Core Units (TCUs) enhance modern accelerators with superior computing power, which is promising to boost the performance of matrix operators to a higher level. However, due to the irregularity of unstructured sparse data, it is difficult to deliver practical speedups on TCUs. To this end, we propose FlashSparse, a novel approach to bridge the gap between sparse workloads and the TCU architecture. Specifically, FlashSparse minimizes the sparse granularity for SpMM and SDDMM on TCUs through a novel swap-and-transpose matrix multiplication strategy. Benefiting from the minimum sparse granularity, the computation redundancy is remarkably reduced while the computing power of TCUs is fully utilized. Besides, FlashSparse is equipped with a memory-efficient thread mapping strategy for coalesced data access and a sparse matrix storage format to save memory footprint. Extensive experimental results on H100 and RTX 4090 GPUs show that FlashSparse sets a new state-of-the-art for sparse matrix multiplications (geometric mean 5.5x speedup over DTC-SpMM and 3.22x speedup over RoDe).
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵-矩阵乘法（SpMM）和采样密集-密集矩阵乘法（SDDMM）是科学计算和深度学习中重要的稀疏算子。张量核心单元（TCU）增强了现代加速器的卓越计算能力，有望将矩阵算子的性能提升到更高水平。然而，由于非结构化稀疏数据的不规则性，很难在 TCU 上提供实际的加速。为此，我们提出了 FlashSparse，这是一种弥合稀疏工作负载和 TCU 架构之间差距的新颖方法。具体来说，FlashSparse 通过新颖的交换转置矩阵乘法策略最小化 TCU 上 SpMM 和 SDDMM 的稀疏粒度。受益于最小稀疏粒度，在充分利用TCU计算能力的同时，计算冗余显着降低。此外，FlashSparse 配备了用于合并数据访问的内存高效线程映射策略和稀疏矩阵存储格式以节省内存占用。 H100 和 RTX 4090 GPU 上的大量实验结果表明，FlashSparse 为稀疏矩阵乘法设定了新的最先进技术（几何平均比 DTC-SpMM 加速 5.5 倍，比 RoDe 加速 3.22 倍）。

items.title: Publish on Ping: A Better Way to Publish Reservations in Memory Reclamation for Concurrent Data Structures.
items.abstract: Safe memory reclamation techniques that utilize per read reservations, such as hazard pointers and hazard eras, often cause significant overhead in traversals of linked concurrent data structures. This is primarily due to the need to announce a reservation, and fence to make it globally visible (and enforce appropriate ordering), before each read. In real world read-intensive workloads, this overhead is amplified because, even if relatively little memory reclamation actually occurs, the full overhead of reserving records before use is still incurred while traversing data structures.
items.abstract_zh: 利用每次读取预留的安全内存回收技术（例如危险指针和危险时代）通常会在遍历链接的并发数据结构时导致显着的开销。这主要是因为需要在每次读取之前宣布预订，并围栏以使其全局可见（并强制执行适当的排序）。在现实世界的读取密集型工作负载中，这种开销会被放大，因为即使实际发生的内存回收相对较少，在使用前保留记录的全部开销仍然会在遍历数据结构时产生。

items.title: COMPSO: Optimizing Gradient Compression for Distributed Training with Second-Order Optimizers.
items.abstract: Second-order optimization methods have been developed to enhance convergence and generalization in deep neural network (DNN) training compared to first-order methods like Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD). However, these methods face challenges in distributed settings due to high communication overhead. Gradient compression, a technique commonly used to accelerate communication for first-order approaches, often results in low communication reduction ratios, decreased model accuracy, and/or high compression overhead when applied to second-order methods. To address these limitations, we introduce a novel gradient compression method for second-order optimizers called COMPSO. This method effectively reduces communication costs while preserving the advantages of second-order optimization. COMPSO employs stochastic rounding to maintain accuracy and filters out minor gradients to improve compression ratios. Additionally, we develop GPU optimizations to minimize compression overhead and performance modeling to ensure end-to-end performance gains across various systems. Evaluation of COMPSO on different DNN models shows that it achieves a compression ratio of 22.1×, reduces communication time by 14.2×, and improves overall performance by 1.9×, all without any drop in model accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 与随机梯度下降 (SGD) 等一阶方法相比，二阶优化方法的开发旨在增强深度神经网络 (DNN) 训练的收敛性和泛化性。然而，由于高通信开销，这些方法在分布式环境中面临挑战。梯度压缩是一种常用于加速一阶方法通信的技术，当应用于二阶方法时，通常会导致低通信缩减率、降低的模型精度和/或高压缩开销。为了解决这些限制，我们为二阶优化器引入了一种新颖的梯度压缩方法，称为 COMPSO。该方法有效降低了通信成本，同时保留了二阶优化的优点。 COMPSO 采用随机舍入来保持精度并滤除较小的梯度以提高压缩比。此外，我们还开发 GPU 优化以最大限度地减少压缩开销和性能建模，以确保跨各种系统的端到端性能提升。 COMPSO在不同DNN模型上的评估表明，它实现了22.1×的压缩比，减少了14.2×的通信时间，并提高了1.9×的整体性能，并且模型精度没有任何下降。

items.title: Helios: Efficient Distributed Dynamic Graph Sampling for Online GNN Inference.
items.abstract: Online GNN inference has been widely explored by applications such as online recommendation and financial fraud detection systems, where even minor delays can result in significant financial impact. Real-time dynamic graph sampling enables online GNN inference to reflect the latest graph updates in real-world graphs. However, online GNN inference typically demands millisecond-level latency Service Level Objectives (SLOs) as its performance guarantees, which poses great challenges for existing dynamic graph sampling approaches based on graph databases. The issues mainly arise from two aspects: long tail latency due to imbalanced data-dependent sampling and large communication overhead incurred by distributed sampling. To address these issues, we propose Helios, an efficient distributed dynamic graph sampling service to meet the stringent latency SLOs. The key ideas of Helios are 1) pre-sampling the dynamic graph in an event-driven approach, and 2) maintaining a query-aware sample cache to build the complete K-hop sampling results locally for inference requests. Experiments on multiple datasets show that Helios achieves up to 67× higher serving throughput and up to 32× lower P99 query latency compared to baselines.
items.abstract_zh: 在线 GNN 推理已被在线推荐和金融欺诈检测系统等应用广泛探索，即使是轻微的延迟也可能导致重大的财务影响。实时动态图采样使在线 GNN 推理能够反映现实世界图中最新的图更新。然而，在线GNN推理通常需要毫秒级的延迟服务级别目标（SLO）作为其性能保证，这对现有基于图数据库的动态图采样方法提出了巨大的挑战。这些问题主要来自两个方面：由于数据相关采样不平衡导致的长尾延迟和分布式采样产生的大量通信开销。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 Helios，一种高效的分布式动态图采样服务，可以满足严格的延迟 SLO。 Helios 的关键思想是 1) 以事件驱动的方法对动态图进行预采样，2) 维护查询感知样本缓存以在本地构建完整的 K 跳采样结果以用于推理请求。对多个数据集的实验表明，与基线相比，Helios 的服务吞吐量提高了 67 倍，P99 查询延迟降低了 32 倍。

items.title: Effectively Virtual Page Prefetching via Spatial-Temporal Patterns for Memory-intensive Cloud Applications.
items.abstract: In today's data-driven era, the explosive growth of global data volume has led to an increasing consumption of computing and storage resources. Effective management of virtual machines (VMs) memory usage is critical for cloud vendors to optimize system performance and resource utilization. Existing memory prefetching methods often slow down system performance, creating a difficult balance between maintaining service quality and optimizing resource use. For instance, Leap, which primarily utilizes address information, performs poorly in VM environments. The main issue is the performance drop caused by the reuse of memory resources in virtualized environments, a common situation in public clouds.
items.abstract_zh: 在当今数据驱动的时代，全球数据量的爆炸性增长导致计算和存储资源的消耗不断增加。有效管理虚拟机 (VM) 内存使用情况对于云供应商优化系统性能和资源利用率至关重要。现有的内存预取方法通常会降低系统性能，从而在维持服务质量和优化资源使用之间造成困难的平衡。例如，主要利用地址信息的Leap在VM环境中表现不佳。主要问题是虚拟化环境中内存资源的重用导致的性能下降，这在公共云中很常见。

items.title: Improving Tridiagonalization Performance on GPU Architectures.
items.abstract: Tridiagonalization, which is a key step in symmetric eigenvalue decomposition (EVD), aims to convert a symmetric matrix to a tridiagonal form. In Nvidia's cuSOLVER library, the FP64 precision tridiagonalization process only reach 2.1 TFLOPs out of 67 TFLOPs on H100 GPU, and it consumes a significant portion of the elapsed time in the entire EVD process, accounting for over 97%. Thus, improving the tridiagonalization performance is crucial on accelerating EVD. In this paper, we analyze the reasons behind the suboptimal performance of tridiagonalization on GPU architectures, and we propose a new double blocking band reduction algorithm along with an implementation of GPU-based bulge chasing to improve the tridiagonalization performance. Through experimental evaluation, the proposed FP64 precision tridiagonalization method yields up to 19.6 TFLOPs which is 9.3x and 5.2x faster compared cuSOVLER and MAGMA, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 三对角化是对称特征值分解（EVD）的关键步骤，旨在将对称矩阵转换为三对角形式。在Nvidia的cuSOLVER库中，FP64精度三对角化过程在H100 GPU上的67 TFLOP中仅达到2.1 TFLOP，并且它消耗了整个EVD过程中所用时间的很大一部分，占97％以上。因此，提高三对角化性能对于加速EVD至关重要。在本文中，我们分析了 GPU 架构上三对角化性能欠佳的原因，并提出了一种新的双块带缩减算法以及基于 GPU 的凸块追逐的实现，以提高三对角化性能。通过实验评估，所提出的 FP64 精度三对角化方法的速度高达 19.6 TFLOP，比 cuSOVLER 和 MAGMA 分别快 9.3 倍和 5.2 倍。

items.title: Swift Unfolding of Communities: GPU-Accelerated Louvain Algorithm.
items.abstract: The Louvain algorithm is one of the most popular algorithms for community detection. Observing that existing implementations suffer from inaccurate pruning and inefficient intermediate state management, we introduce GALA, GPU-Accelerated Louvain Algorithm, which incorporates two key innovations. The first innovation is a novel modularity gain-based pruning strategy, supported by rigorous theoretical guarantees of optimality and able to reduce up to 76% of vertices as well as their corresponding computations. To take advantage of the memory hierarchy and parallelism of GPUs, the second innovation is workload-aware kernels, featuring a shuffle-based kernel founded on the warp-level primitives for exchange states and a hash-based kernel that prioritizes shared memory in hashtable design. GALA further scales to multiple GPUs by minimizing the synchronization overhead between GPUs through a dense-sparse synchronization strategy. We evaluate the performance of GALA through theoretical analysis and practical experiments on various real-world graphs. The experimental results confirm that GALA significantly improves the performance of the parallel Louvain algorithm on GPUs, surpassing state-of-the-art solutions by 6× on average.
items.abstract_zh: Louvain 算法是最流行的社区检测算法之一。观察到现有的实现存在剪枝不准确和中间状态管理效率低下的问题，我们引入了 GALA（GPU 加速的 Louvain 算法），它融合了两项关键创新。第一项创新是一种新颖的基于模块化增益的剪枝策略，该策略由严格的最优性理论保证支持，能够减少高达 76% 的顶点及其相应的计算量。为了利用 GPU 的内存层次结构和并行性，第二项创新是工作负载感知内核，其特点是基于交换状态的 warp 级原语的基于 shuffle 的内核，以及在哈希表设计中优先考虑共享内存的基于哈希的内核。 GALA 通过密集-稀疏同步策略最小化 GPU 之间的同步开销，进一步扩展到多个 GPU。我们通过理论分析和对各种真实世界图的实际实验来评估 GALA 的性能。实验结果证实，GALA 显着提高了并行 Louvain 算法在 GPU 上的性能，平均超过最先进的解决方案 6 倍。

items.title: Crystality: A Programming Model for Smart Contracts on Parallel EVMs.
items.abstract: Scaling blockchain performance through parallel smart contract execution has gained significant attention, as traditional methods remain constrained by the performance of a single virtual machine (VM), even in multi-chain or Layer-2 systems. Parallel VMs offer a compelling solution by enabling concurrent transaction execution within a single smart contract, using multiple CPU cores. However, Ethereum's sequential, shared-everything model limits the efficiency of existing parallel mechanisms, resulting in frequent rollbacks with optimistic methods and high overhead with pessimistic methods due to state dependency analysis and locking.
items.abstract_zh: 通过并行智能合约执行来扩展区块链性能已引起广泛关注，因为即使在多链或第 2 层系统中，传统方法仍然受到单个虚拟机 (VM) 性能的限制。并行虚拟机通过使用多个 CPU 核心在单个智能合约中启用并发事务执行，提供了引人注目的解决方案。然而，以太坊的顺序、共享一切的模型限制了现有并行机制的效率，导致乐观方法频繁回滚，而由于状态依赖分析和锁定而导致悲观方法开销较高。

items.title: Harnessing Inter-GPU Shared Memory for Seamless MoE Communication-Computation Fusion.
items.abstract: The Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture enhances model quality by scaling up model parameters. However, its development is hindered in distributed training scenarios due to significant communication overhead and expert load imbalance. Existing methods, which only allow for coarse-grained overlapping of communication and computation, slightly alleviate communication costs but at the same time, they introduce a notable impairment of computational efficiency. Furthermore, current approaches to addressing load imbalance often compromise model quality.
items.abstract_zh: 专家混合 (MoE) 架构通过扩大模型参数来提高模型质量。然而，由于巨大的通信开销和专家负载不平衡，它在分布式训练场景中的发展受到阻碍。现有的方法仅允许通信和计算的粗粒度重叠，稍微减轻了通信成本，但同时，它们对计算效率造成了显着的损害。此外，当前解决负载不平衡的方法通常会损害模型质量。

items.title: TurboFFT: Co-Designed High-Performance and Fault-Tolerant Fast Fourier Transform on GPUs.
items.abstract: GPU-based fast Fourier transform (FFT) is extremely important for scientific computing and signal processing. However, we find the inefficiency of existing FFT libraries and the absence of fault tolerance against soft error. To address these issues, we introduce TurboFFT, a new FFT prototype co-designed for high performance and online fault tolerance. For FFT, we propose an architecture-aware, padding-free, and template-based prototype to maximize hardware resource utilization, achieving a competitive or superior performance compared to the state-of-the-art closed-source library, cuFFT. For fault tolerance, we 1) explore algorithm-based fault tolerance (ABFT) at the thread and threadblock levels to reduce additional memory footprint, 2) address the error propagation by introducing a two-side ABFT with location encoding, and 3) further modify the threadblock-level FFT from 1-transaction to multi-transaction in order to bring more parallelism for ABFT. Our two-side strategy enables online correction without additional global memory while our multi-transaction design averages the expensive threadblock-level reduction in ABFT with zero additional operations. Experimental results on an NVIDIA A100 server GPU and a Tesla Turing T4 GPU demonstrate that TurboFFT without fault tolerance is comparable to or up to 300% faster than cuFFT and outperforms VkFFT. TurboFFT with fault tolerance maintains an overhead of 7% to 15%, even under tens of error injections per minute for both FP32 and FP64.
items.abstract_zh: 基于 GPU 的快速傅立叶变换 (FFT) 对于科学计算和信号处理极其重要。然而，我们发现现有 FFT 库效率低下，并且缺乏针对软错误的容错能力。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了 TurboFFT，这是一种为高性能和在线容错而共同设计的新 FFT 原型。对于 FFT，我们提出了一种架构感知、无填充和基于模板的原型，以最大限度地提高硬件资源利用率，与最先进的闭源库 cuFFT 相比，实现具有竞争力或优越的性能。对于容错，我们 1) 在线程和线程块级别探索基于算法的容错 (ABFT)，以减少额外的内存占用，2) 通过引入具有位置编码的两侧 ABFT 来解决错误传播问题，3) 进一步将线程块级 FFT 从 1 事务修改为多事务，以便为 ABFT 带来更多并行性。我们的两侧策略无需额外的全局内存即可实现在线校正，而我们的多事务设计则以零额外操作平均化了 ABFT 中昂贵的线程块级减少。在 NVIDIA A100 服务器 GPU 和 Tesla Turing T4 GPU 上的实验结果表明，无容错功能的 TurboFFT 与 cuFFT 相当或快 300%，并且性能优于 VkFFT。即使 FP32 和 FP64 每分钟发生数十次错误注入，具有容错能力的 TurboFFT 也能保持 7% 到 15% 的开销。

items.title: PANNS: Enhancing Graph-based Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search through Recency-aware Construction and Parameterized Search.
items.abstract: Approximate Nearest-Neighbor Search (ANNS) has become the standard querying method in vector databases, especially with the recent surge in large-scale, high-dimensional data driven by LLM-based applications. Recently, graph-based ANNS has shown improved throughput by constructing a graph from the dataset, with edges representing the distances between data points, and using best-first or beam search algorithms for query evaluation.
items.abstract_zh: 近似最近邻搜索 (ANNS) 已成为矢量数据库中的标准查询方法，特别是最近基于 LLM 的应用程序驱动的大规模、高维数据激增。最近，基于图的 ANNS 通过从数据集构建图（边缘表示数据点之间的距离）并使用最佳优先或波束搜索算法进行查询评估，显示出吞吐量的提高。

items.title: EVeREST: An Effective and Versatile Runtime Energy Saving Tool for GPUs.
items.abstract: Amid conflicting demands for ever-improving performance and maximizing energy savings, it is important to have a tool that automatically identifies opportunities to save power/energy at runtime without compromising performance. GPUs in particular present challenges due to (1) reduced savings available from memory bound applications, and (2) limited availability of low overhead performance counters. Thus, a successful tool must address these issues while still tackling the challenges of dynamic application characterization, versatility across processors from different vendors, and effectiveness at making the right power-performance tradeoffs for desired energy savings.
items.abstract_zh: 在不断提高性能和最大限度地节省能源的矛盾需求中，拥有一个能够自动识别运行时节省电力/能源的机会而不影响性能的工具非常重要。 GPU 尤其面临挑战，因为 (1) 内存受限应用程序的可用节省减少，以及 (2) 低开销性能计数器的可用性有限。因此，成功的工具必须解决这些问题，同时仍然应对动态应用特征、不同供应商处理器之间的多功能性以及为实现所需节能而进行正确的功耗性能权衡的有效性等挑战。

items.title: FastBWA: Practical and Cost-Efficient Genome Sequence Alignment Pipeline.
items.abstract: Sequence alignment is a fundamental and often time-consuming step in genomic data analysis. Typically, it adheres to the seed-and-extension paradigm and numerous accelerator-based approaches have been proposed to optimize either of the kernels. However, these approaches often increase costs and contribute minimally to the overall alignment process. To address this, we have designed an optimized full pipeline, FastBWA, which seeks to enhance performance while keeping costs low and explores the potential of CPU computing resources. Our implementation demonstrates that FastBWA achieves up to 2.5× and 1.8× in end-to-end alignment throughput compared to BWA-MEM and its newer version, BWA-MEM2.
items.abstract_zh: 序列比对是基因组数据分析中的基本且通常耗时的步骤。通常，它遵循种子和扩展范式，并且已经提出了许多基于加速器的方法来优化任一内核。然而，这些方法通常会增加成本，并且对整体对准过程的贡献微乎其微。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了优化的全流程FastBWA，旨在提高性能的同时保持较低的成本，并挖掘CPU计算资源的潜力。我们的实施表明，与 BWA-MEM 及其更新版本 BWA-MEM2 相比，FastBWA 的端到端对齐吞吐量分别提高了 2.5 倍和 1.8 倍。

items.title: Jigsaw: Toward Conflict-free Vectorized Stencil Computation by Tessellating Swizzled Registers.
items.abstract: Stencil computation plays a pivotal role in numerous scientific and engineering applications. Previous studies have extensively investigated vectorization techniques to enhance in-core parallelism; however, the performance bottleneck caused by data alignment conflicts (DAC) has not been effectively resolved in all dimensions. This paper proposes Jigsaw, a conflict-free vectorization method to reduce DAC across all dimensions by tessellating swizzled finest-grained lanes. Jigsaw comprises three key components: Lane-based Butterfly Vectorization, SVD-based Dimension Flattening, and Iteration-based Temporal Merging. These components effectively address DAC across spatial and temporal dimensions. Experimental results on different machines demonstrate that Jigsaw could achieve a significant improvement compared to the state-of-the-art techniques, with an average speedup of 2.31x on various stencil kernels.
items.abstract_zh: 模板计算在众多科学和工程应用中发挥着关键作用。先前的研究广泛研究了矢量化技术以增强核内并行性；然而，数据对齐冲突（DAC）带来的性能瓶颈尚未在各个维度得到有效解决。本文提出了 Jigsaw，这是一种无冲突矢量化方法，通过对混合的最细粒度通道进行镶嵌来减少所有维度上的 DAC。 Jigsaw 包含三个关键组件：基于车道的蝴蝶矢量化、基于 SVD 的维度扁平化和基于迭代的时间合并。这些组件有效地跨空间和时间维度处理 DAC。在不同机器上的实验结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，Jigsaw 可以实现显着的改进，在各种模板内核上平均加速达 2.31 倍。

items.title: Acc-SpMM: Accelerating General-purpose Sparse Matrix-Matrix Multiplication with GPU Tensor Cores.
items.abstract: General-purpose Sparse Matrix-Matrix Multiplication (SpMM) is a fundamental kernel in scientific computing and deep learning. The emergence of new matrix computation units such as Tensor Cores (TCs) brings more opportunities for SpMM acceleration. However, in order to fully unleash the power of hardware performance, systematic optimization is required. In this paper, we propose Acc-SpMM, a high-performance SpMM library on TCs, with multiple optimizations, including data-affinity-based reordering, memory efficient compressed format, high-throughput pipeline, and adaptive sparsity-aware load balancing. In contrast to the state-of-the-art SpMM kernels on various NVIDIA GPU architectures with a diverse range of benchmark matrices, Acc-SpMM achieves significant performance improvements, on average 2.52x (up to 5.11x) speedup on RTX 4090, on average 1.91x (up to 4.68x) speedup on A800, and on average 1.58x (up to 3.60x) speedup on H100 over cuSPARSE.
items.abstract_zh: 通用稀疏矩阵-矩阵乘法（SpMM）是科学计算和深度学习的基本内核。 Tensor Cores（TC）等新型矩阵计算单元的出现为SpMM加速带来了更多机会。然而，为了充分发挥硬件性能的威力，还需要系统性的优化。在本文中，我们提出了 Acc-SpMM，一个基于 TC 的高性能 SpMM 库，具有多种优化，包括基于数据亲和力的重新排序、内存高效压缩格式、高吞吐量管道和自适应稀疏感知负载平衡。与具有各种基准矩阵的各种 NVIDIA GPU 架构上最先进的 SpMM 内核相比，Acc-SpMM 实现了显着的性能改进，在 RTX 4090 上平均加速 2.52 倍（高达 5.11 倍），在 A800 上平均加速 1.91 倍（高达 4.68 倍），平均加速 1.58 倍（高达 3.60 倍） H100 比 cuSPARSE 加速。

items.title: FlashTensor: Optimizing Tensor Programs by Leveraging Fine-grained Tensor Property.
items.abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have shown significant effectiveness in natural language processing and video applications. However, DNN models, especially for long-context tasks, introduce extremely large intermediate tensors, producing substantial memory overhead. Although considerable efforts have been made to optimize DNNs, insufficient awareness of tensor properties has hindered effective memory optimization and can lead to inefficient computations in a long-context scenario.
items.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）在自然语言处理和视频应用中显示出显着的有效性。 However, DNN models, especially for long-context tasks, introduce extremely large intermediate tensors, producing substantial memory overhead.尽管人们在优化 DNN 方面付出了相当大的努力，但对张量属性的认识不足阻碍了有效的内存优化，并可能导致长上下文场景中的计算效率低下。

items.title: A General and Scalable GCN Training Framework on CPU Supercomputers.
items.abstract: Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) are widely used in various domains. However, training distributed full-batch GCNs on large-scale graphs poses challenges due to inefficient memory access patterns and high communication overhead. This paper presents a general and efficient GCN training framework on CPU supercomputers. It comprises a general aggregation kernel designed to optimize irregular memory access and a quantization method with label propagation to reduce communication overhead. Experimental results show that our method achieves a speedup of up to 4.1× compared with the SoTA implementations.
items.abstract_zh: 图卷积网络（GCN）广泛应用于各个领域。然而，由于低效的内存访问模式和高通信开销，在大规模图上训练分布式全批量 GCN 带来了挑战。本文提出了一种在 CPU 超级计算机上通用且高效的 GCN 训练框架。它包括一个旨在优化不规则内存访问的通用聚合内核和一个带有标签传播的量化方法，以减少通信开销。实验结果表明，与 SoTA 实现相比，我们的方法实现了高达 4.1 倍的加速。

items.title: Semi-StructMG: A Fast and Scalable Semi-Structured Algebraic Multigrid.
items.abstract: Parallel multigrid methods are widely used as preconditioned for solving large sparse linear systems. Most multigrids rely on general sparse matrix formats, which prevent them from achieving optimal performance. There is an emerging trend towards semi-structured multigrids that balance flexibility with performance. However, existing libraries often fall short in terms of speed and scalability for semi-structured problems. To address these limitations, we have designed and implemented Semi-StructMG. It employs multi-dimensional coarsening to reduce complexity and simplify communication patterns. It also considers the special role of inter-block connections in smoothers and triple-matrix products to improve convergence under large-scale parallelism. We evaluated Semi-StructMG using two benchmark problems and four real-world applications from petroleum reservoir simulation, ship manufacturing, numerical weather prediction, and ocean modeling. Compared to hypre's multigrids, Semi-StructMG achieves the fastest time-to-solution across all cases, with average speedups of 5.97x, 15.2x, and 3.85x over SSAMG, Split, and BoomerAMG, respectively. Additionally, Semi-StructMG significantly improves both strong and weak scaling efficiencies in all tests. These results suggest that it can serve as an effective alternative to SSAMG and Split.
items.abstract_zh: 并行多重网格方法广泛用作求解大型稀疏线性系统的预处理。大多数多重网格依赖于通用的稀疏矩阵格式，这阻碍了它们实现最佳性能。平衡灵活性和性能的半结构化多重网格正在成为一种新兴趋势。然而，现有的库在解决半结构化问题的速度和可扩展性方面往往存在不足。为了解决这些限制，我们设计并实现了 Semi-StructMG。它采用多维粗化来降低复杂性并简化通信模式。它还考虑了平滑器和三重矩阵乘积中块间连接的特殊作用，以提高大规模并行性下的收敛性。我们使用两个基准问题和四个来自石油储层模拟、船舶制造、数值天气预报和海洋建模的实际应用来评估 Semi-StructMG。与 hypre 的多重网格相比，Semi-StructMG 在所有情况下都实现了最快的解决时间，与 SSAMG、Split 和 BoomerAMG 相比，平均加速分别为 5.97 倍、15.2 倍和 3.85 倍。此外，Semi-StructMG 在所有测试中都显着提高了强扩展和弱扩展效率。这些结果表明它可以作为 SSAMG 和 Split 的有效替代品。
